description: MCP server for XRPL identity: DIDs, credentials, signer lists, and safe transaction workflows.
name: io.github.jarod-vyent/xrpl-identity-mcp

environmentVariables.description: XRPL network to target: mainnet, testnet, or devnet (default: testnet)
environmentVariables.name: XRPL_NETWORK

environmentVariables.description: Custom XRPL websocket endpoint override (default: public endpoint for the selected network)
environmentVariables.name: XRPL_ENDPOINT

environmentVariables.description: Must be set to 'true' to allow tx_submit_signed on mainnet (default: blocked)
environmentVariables.name: ALLOW_MAINNET_SUBMIT
